query_key_score_calculation.description: kq = ggml_mul_mat(ctx, k, q); cb(kq, "kq", il);

softmax_calculation.description: kq = ggml_soft_max_ext(ctx, kq, kq_mask, kq_scale, hparams.f_max_alibi_bias);

value_weighted_sum.description: read cached V, compute kqv = ggml_mul_mat(ctx, v, kq), then merge to kqv_merged_cont

kv_cache_write.description: llm_build_kv_store writes K/V into cache_k_l* and cache_v_l*; stores RoPE-ed K; non-flash V cache is transposed

key.description: ggml_view_3d over kv.k_l[il] to read cached K

value.description: ggml_view_3d over kv.v_l[il] to read cached V in non-flash path

kernel_broadcast_mapping.description: r2 = ne12 / ne02; i02 = i12 / r2, i.e. kvHeadIndex = headIndex / (n_head / n_head_kv)

rope_application.description: Qcur and Kcur are reshaped and both passed through ggml_rope_ext before llm_build_kv; Vcur is not

cache_k_memory_order.underlying_tensor: cache_k_l0 is a 1D tensor of length n_embd_k_gqa * kv_size
cache_k_memory_order.read_index_formula: k_offset_elements = tokenIndex * (n_head_kv * head_dim) + kvHeadIndex * head_dim + dimIndex

cache_v_memory_order.underlying_tensor: cache_v_l0 is a 1D tensor of length n_embd_v_gqa * kv_size, but non-flash path accesses it as transposed V cache
cache_v_memory_order.layout: head-major/channel-major with token as fastest axis (non-flash transposed V cache)
cache_v_memory_order.per_token_layout: logical read is V[tokenIndex, kvHeadIndex, dimIndex], but underlying element offset is tokenIndex + n_ctx * dimIndex + n_ctx * head_dim * kvHeadIndex
cache_v_memory_order.read_index_formula: v_offset_elements = tokenIndex + n_ctx * dimIndex + n_ctx * head_dim * kvHeadIndex

rope_for_current_scenario.application_stage: after Qcur/Kcur reshape to [head_dim, head_count, n_tokens] and before llm_build_kv stores/reads cached attention

value_aggregation_precision_for_current_.round_trip_explanation: Kcur/Vcur are produced as F32 runtime tensors, copied into F16 KV cache, then read back from F16 cache views during cached attention

default_kv_types.description: default llama_context_params uses F16 for both type_k and type_v

non_flash_v_quantization_guard.description: if params.type_v != F16 and !flash_attn then context creation fails

cpu_attention_accumulator.description: CPU attention kernel uses FP16 temporary accumulator for F16 V path, converts to F32, then divides by S in F32

generated_files.name: hi_cached_attention_dump.json
generated_files.description: Cached attention root-cause dump for hi chat prompt
